description: This email template is perfect for businesses looking to promote their health and wellness products during the summer season. With a one-column layout, it features a dark green and vibrant orange color scheme, evoking a feel of lush palm trees and warm summer days. It's an excellent choice for a seasonal promotion or a summer sale, with ample space to highlight discounts on your products. The overall design emphasizes a healthy, green and sustainable lifestyle, making it ideal for businesses in the health and wellness sector. The palm tree graphics add a touch of tropical flair, enhancing the summer vibe.
short_description: Promote your summer sale with our one-column email layout, ideal for health and wellness brands. This vibrant template showcases your discounts on a dark green and orange backdrop, subtly enhancing a sense of vitality. Palm tree graphics add a tropical touch, perfect for your seasonal promotion. Boost your product promotion with this summer-themed design.

designer.description: A team of passionate designers, marketers, and technologists with an understanding that great design inspires action. At Beefree, we’re committed to creating responsive, mobile-friendly, and high-converting templates that empower teams to get more done with less time.
